titlestmt.titleproper: Hospitality Leadership: The Cornell Hotel School/ / by Brad Edmondson; edited by John Marcham research files28-12-3774
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-08-26 18:25:13 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Hospitality Leadership: The Cornell Hotel School/ / by Brad Edmondson; edited by John Marcham research files

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Photographs, Printed Materials, Research Materials
did.abstract: Includes correpondence, photographs, memos, programs, and other research files used in the writing of the book Hospitality Leadership: The Cornell Hotel School.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correpondence, photographs, memos, programs, and other research files used in the writing of the book Hospitality Leadership: The Cornell Hotel School.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Hospitality Leadership: The Cornell Hotel School research papers, #28-12-3774. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Hotel management schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
Hotel management -- Study and teaching.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration -- : History.

did.unittitle: Black and white photos of buildings on campus; two clipped from newspapers of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen's annual dinner-dance.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Author: 1st 5 are by Teele, 6th is by Standard Flashlight Co., 7th is by Drucker and Baltes
Recipient: Sent from Betty Crandall to Brad Edmondson

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Additional description: Article in Hotel Management written by one of the first two men to graduate from the Hotel School. / Damaged copy of Travel News newsletter wrapped in plastic. / Paper w/ Cornell emblem and John Alfred Bullock's name on it, under a little sign that says "Ye Hosts".

scopecontent.p: Recipient: Marcham, John / Chiu, Michael; Kennedy, Richard; Brown, Richard; Marcham, John

did.unittitle: Various correspondences regarding the HH Book
Letter
Sidebar for HH Book

2 memos; one regarding the acknowledgement to be written for the underwriters, the other about getting more information about potential underwriters. Also, there are two lists of past presidents of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen, and a list of underwriters.

The first three letters are notes on Various editing/writing problems with the book from presumed proofreaders; the fourth is a letter to one of the proofreaders (Lattin) thanking him for his suggestions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Author: Unknown / Shellenberger, Susan / Kiethen, J. / Kennedy, Richard
Recipient: Marcham, John / Marcham, John / Kennedy, Richard / Lattin, Gerald

did.unittitle: The first two letters list corrections that need to be made to the first draft of the book. The third one is Marcham talking about the corrections that he has received so far.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Author: Munster, Rudolf / Chiu, Michael / Marcham, John
Recipient: Marcham, John / Marcham, John / Brad, Phil, and Ira

did.unittitle: The first letter to the HH readers is asking them to proofread the attached photo captions. The second one is asking them to proofread the last chapter of the book. The next document is a schedule for a HH Book meeting. The other two are correspondence about suggestions/corrections for the book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Recipient: Hotel History reader (2) / None / Phil and Brad / Brad and Ira
